sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23107" key="gurwte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γυρ-ωτέον</orth>, <sense id="n23107.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must surround with a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γῦρος, τοὺς ὀφθαλμούς</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.21.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
